# AI・データサイエンス・IT学習ノート

## Site purpose

stemtazoo.github.io is a Japanese learning blog that organizes beginner-friendly study notes for AI, data science, Python, G検定, and Information Security Management Examination (SG試験) topics.

The site is intended to help readers review concepts, compare similar terms, and understand exam-oriented judgment criteria without claiming to provide APIs, tools, authentication services, or an MCP server.

## Primary audience

- Japanese learners studying AI, data science, Python, and IT basics
- G検定 learners who want conceptual explanations and confusion-prevention notes
- SG試験 learners who want practical security-management judgment criteria
- Readers and AI assistants looking for public pages to cite or summarize accurately

## Main sections

- Data Science / Python / IT learning notes: https://stemtazoo.github.io/ds/
- G検定 study notes: https://stemtazoo.github.io/gk/
- SG試験 study notes: https://stemtazoo.github.io/sg/
- Site search: https://stemtazoo.github.io/search/
- XML sitemap: https://stemtazoo.github.io/sitemap.xml

## Content use policy

- Search indexing is welcome.
- AI-assisted reading and citation are welcome.
- Use for model training is not preferred.

## Discovery notes for AI agents

Use the sitemap to discover public pages. Use section index pages to understand topic groupings before citing individual articles. This site is a static GitHub Pages / Jekyll blog and does not advertise an API catalog, OAuth/OIDC discovery, MCP server, WebMCP endpoint, or protected-resource metadata.
